title: cups security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:2.4.10-12.2]
- fix use-after-free reported by OSH

[1:2.4.10-12.1]
- RHEL-129721 CVE-2025-58436 cups: Slow client communication leads to a possible DoS attack
- RHEL-129715 CVE-2025-61915 cups: Local denial-of-service via cupsd.conf update and related issues
full_text:
[1:2.4.10-12.2]
- fix use-after-free reported by OSH

[1:2.4.10-12.1]
- RHEL-129721 CVE-2025-58436 cups: Slow client communication leads to a possible DoS attack
- RHEL-129715 CVE-2025-61915 cups: Local denial-of-service via cupsd.conf update and related issues

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0464.html
